macro.title: Immigration policy, economic uncertainty reshaping housing market
macro.what: Builders are reporting sales impacts from policy shifts as consumers become increasingly skeptical of traditional “dream home” marketing.
macro.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
macro.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

macro.title: Mortgage rates move higher as inflation fears grow
macro.what: Mortgage rates continued to rise this week, placing more strain on a 2026 spring housing market that was expected to be robust but is now fighting an uphill battle against a slowin
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
